intake_agent -> account_service.description: Intake asks the account service to look up the customer/order.

intake_agent -> resolution_agent.description: Intake hands the classified request to the resolution agent.

refund_service -> account_service.description: Refund service emits a reliable event that a refund was executed.

resolution_agent -> refund_service.description: Resolution agent proposes a refund; the payment service executes it (irreversible).
